data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time-to-complete and abandonment checkpoints', but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for these checkpoints, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of time-to-complete and abandonment checkpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
